surface_verification.justification: CLI/library change to the gitleaks scanner wrapper (Python backend in shipwright-security); no web/runtime surface and no UI-consumed code. The real-binary E2E is the smoke test test_gitleaks_detect_scans_committed_shipwright_dir, unmockable locally (gitleaks not installed) and executed on Linux by this iterate's own PR CI (now CI-gated via ADR-044, not silently skipped).

behaviors.behavior: _run_gitleaks returns findings from the report FILE (not stdout)
--report-path value is a real temp file, never '-'
gitleaks config + report temp files are cleaned up
_run_tool surfaces stderr when an expect_nonzero tool yields no output
malformed/garbage report file degrades to [] without raising
smoke positive-control fails (not skips) in CI on a real gitleaks miss
behaviors.evidence: scan_test_hygiene static probe: no findings (CI-gated pytest.fail accepted) + shared/tests/test_silent_skip_ci_discipline.py 33 passed

behaviors.behavior: real gitleaks binary detects the committed key on Linux CI
behaviors.reason: gitleaks not installed locally; the smoke test runs the real binary in this iterate's own PR CI on Linux (the live probe) and is not unit-mockable
